purpose: Frozen non-negotiable regression benchmark for Level B offline validation, to be executed before any future pre-runtime integration.
governance_rules: No decision or final validation semantics in Level B.
M07-LPR cannot be closed by Level B.
Audit trail and SHADOW remain mandatory.
Critical blocks must remain observable and propagable.
Golden cases are frozen and can only change with explicit baseline version bump.

pass.meaning: Positive canonical cases expected to remain admissible in Level B offline validation.

degrade.meaning: Support-only cases still admissible, but intentionally degraded without conclusive or opposable value.

reject.meaning: Negative golden family. It contains both BLOCKED and REJECTED outcomes. The directory is a non-accepting family, while expected_status remains explicit per case.

non_negotiable_invariants: No decisive or conclusive field is allowed in Level B payloads.
No semantic equivalent of final authorization is allowed in Level B text.
M07 support packages must always expose human_completion_required=true.
M07 support cannot contain m07_closed or equivalent fields.
VALID citations require an official URI.
Audit trail is mandatory for all golden admissible cases.
SHADOW is mandatory for all golden admissible cases.
SUCCESS must be clean: no warnings, no errors, no blocks.
DEGRADED must remain support-only and non-conclusive.
BLOCKED must expose at least one coherent block code.
REJECTED must expose at least one contract or scope violation signal.
Block propagation must remain coherent with status, errors and block codes.
freeze_criteria: The case protects a foundational project invariant stated in the baseline v2.
The case is stable across foreseeable validator refactors.
The case does not depend on runtime services, live retrieval or the federated runner.
The case can be evaluated deterministically from payload + offline validators.
The case represents a failure mode whose silent regression would be architecturally dangerous.
The case has clear expected status and explicit observable evidence.

naming_convention.difference_from_ordinary_tests: Golden tests freeze cross-cutting invariants and outcome families; ordinary tests remain granular, local and evolvable.

cases.title: Clean documentary support payload
required_invariants: all VALID citations carry official URI
cases.frozen_reason: Canonical positive baseline for clean Level B output.

cases.title: M07 support remains open and human-completed
cases.frozen_reason: Protects the non-closure rule for M07-LPR in Level B.

cases.title: Non-critical documentary gap degrades without blocking
cases.frozen_reason: Separates degradable documentary incompleteness from hard blocking outcomes.

cases.title: Essential vigenza uncertainty blocks output
cases.frozen_reason: Protects the mandatory block on uncertain essential vigency.

cases.title: Missing audit trail blocks payload
cases.frozen_reason: Protects audit trail as mandatory offline evidence.

cases.title: Missing SHADOW blocks payload
cases.frozen_reason: Protects SHADOW completeness as mandatory technical trace.

cases.title: Forbidden decisive field final_decision
cases.frozen_reason: Protects the anti-scope boundary at payload level.

cases.title: Forbidden M07 closure attempt
cases.frozen_reason: Protects the explicit prohibition on M07 closure by Level B.

cases.title: VALID citation without official URI
cases.frozen_reason: Protects citation traceability and opponibility constraints.

cases.title: Conclusive textual semantics without forbidden key
required_invariants: semantic guardrail must catch textual conclusions
cases.frozen_reason: Prevents lexical bypass of the forbidden-field guardrail.

cases.title: Incoherent block propagation
cases.frozen_reason: Protects status/warnings/errors/blocks coherence as a foundational contract.
